name: planning-poker-server
description: Planning Poker backend with Socket.IO and Supabase

scripts.build: tsc && node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'fs'; import path from 'path'; import { fileURLToPath } from 'url'; const __dirname = path.dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)); const src = path.join(__dirname, '../dist/planning-poker'); const dst = path.join(__dirname, 'dist/public'); if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.cpSync(src, dst, {recursive:true});console.log('Frontend copied to dist/public');}else{console.log('Frontend dist not found at', src);}"
